titleEn: 70+ HSP Points — Not currently on HSP visa, but had 70+ points 3 years ago — Child of Japanese National
titleJa: 高度専門職70点以上・高度専門職ビザ非保持者（申請3年前も70点以上）（日本人の子）
notes: This checklist has two parts: (A) base documents depending on your current visa type, and (B) HSP-specific tax/insurance/pension documents and point evidence.
For Part A, refer to the checklist corresponding to your current visa and submit the specified items from that checklist.
Japanese-issued certificates must be dated within 3 months of application.
Documents in foreign languages must include a Japanese translation.
Additional documents may be requested during the review process.
